overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring the historic city of Beauclair. The character walks through foggy cobblestone streets, covered outdoor dining courtyards, a stone tunnel, and emerges onto a scenic waterfront promenade with lake and mountain views.

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings on a foggy morning. He passes two NPCs sitting on a wooden bench and continues past a man in red standing in the street. The yellow and grey stone townhouses feature arched doorways and wrought iron window grilles.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered outdoor dining terrace with white tablecloth tables and ivy-covered pergolas overhead. Stone columns line the walkway as Geralt passes NPCs seated at dining tables. The space feels sheltered from the overcast sky above.

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the courtyard toward a stone staircase and tunnel entrance. A woman in a purple dress with a parasol walks across the path. The architecture shifts to warm red-orange stone facades with the tunnel archway becoming prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel passage with red pillars

events.description: entering dark stone tunnel from the lit courtyard
exiting tunnel into bright exterior light

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit stone tunnel toward the exit

entered.detail: enclosed stone tunnel with arched ceiling and rough walls
red painted stone pillar flanking the tunnel entrance
curved stone ceiling of the tunnel passage

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a narrow stone tunnel with red pillars and an arched ceiling, transitioning from natural light to low light conditions. The passage is empty and enclosed, with light visible at the far exit. He continues through and approaches the bright exit at the tunnel's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with lake and mountain views

events.description: emerging from tunnel to open waterfront promenade with scenic lake view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade taking in the scenic views

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel onto a wide waterfront promenade with panoramic views of a misty lake and mountains. The open space features decorative trees, vintage street lamps, and a stone railing along the water. Pedestrians stroll along the path, and a grand palace building is visible across the lake.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the historic city of Beauclair, transitioning from narrow, foggy streets into a bright, panoramic waterfront. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone road lined with grey stone townhouses and wrought iron grilles, passing residents under a heavy morning mist. As he moves forward, the scene shifts into a sheltered outdoor dining terrace characterized by ivy-covered pergolas and white tablecloths before turning toward a stone staircase and red-orange facades. The camera then follows him into the dim, enclosed space of a narrow stone tunnel with red pillars, moving away from the natural light toward a bright opening ahead. Finally, the view expands as he emerges from the tunnel onto a wide promenade, where the enclosed architecture gives way to an open vista of a misty lake, distant mountains, and a grand palace.
